entities.description: an expert query analyzer is a role described as someone tasked with classifying user questions into specific categories
simple is one of the three categories used to classify user questions
complex is one of the three categories used to classify user questions
global is one of the three categories used to classify user questions
the user is the entity whose questions are being classified by the expert query analyzer
the json object is the required format for the response from the expert query analyzer

relations.description: the expert query analyzer classifies questions into the simple category
the expert query analyzer classifies questions into the complex category
the expert query analyzer classifies questions into the global category
the expert query analyzer processes questions submitted by the user
the expert query analyzer must respond using the specified json object format
